replies.msg:
Cow -> irrelevant
（係呀，佢話 Another relevant point 嗰句先 irrelevant 呀，即係中國先會強調自己依法治國噉呀）

There are the reasons we shouldn't eat fish -> main conclusion

Subconclusions:
We shouldn't eat intelligent mammals
No one lives in the sea

你可以用N展人方法答呢啲問題。將每一句或者分句（標點符號之間嘅字）各變成一個 flowchart node，然後畫晒啲因果關係出嚟。係結果嗰啲就係 (sub) conclusions。冇因果關係嗰啲就 irrelevant
另外，真哲學JJ係唔會急嘅，所以你一個急字可能已經嚇走晒佢哋

replies.msg:
捉字蝨
irrelevant premise 係指同個結論無關嘅assumption 無論係啱定錯都可以推出同一個結論 你睇吓下面有冇呢個情況
好多年冇玩過有啲生疏 睇到邊度唔啱拎出嚟討論吓

Argument 1:
premise: i) 食魚就係支持緊commercial fishing
ii) 你食魚
conclusion: 你支持緊commercial fishing

Argument 2:
premise: i) Dolphins and chimpanzees are intelligent mammals
ii) We don't kill intelligent mammals
conclusion: We don't kill dolphins and chimpanzees

Argument 3:
premise: i) we would live in the sea if God wanted people to eat fish
ii) No one lives in the sea
iii) Chicken doesn't live in the sea
conclusion: God doesn't want people to eat fish, so no one should eat fish

Argument 4:
premise: i) You have to support farmers by eating cows
ii) If you eat fish then you are not eating cows
iii) You eat fish
conclusion: You don't support farmers (所以就唔應該食魚？）

replies.msg:
漏咗啲野

Argument 2b:
premise: i) argument 1 is valid (eat fish ---> support commercial fishing)
ii) commercial fishing kills dolphins
iii) argument 2 is valid (we don't kill dolphins and chimpanzees)
conclusion: We should not eat fish

replies.msg:
我同你個睇法差唔多

不過我會覺得 (1)係 irrelevant premise 因為無論我支唔支持commercial fishing，都唔會影響到後面
Kills mammals 呢個 sub-conclusion

P1 : we shouldn’t intelligent mammals
P2 : we don’t think it’s OK to kill Chimpanzees
P3 : dolphins are intelligent mammals
Sub-con : we shouldn’t kill dolphins

Main conclusion : no one should eat fish
